span.p:
Solitary unit
Crosses: none → Doubles: all non-trivial

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sociable unit
Crosses: cheap in-process → Doubles: expensive/external

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DB integration
Crosses: DB seam only → Doubles: network, cache, 3rd-party

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Contract test
Crosses: one HTTP seam (verified) → both services never co-run

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
E2E
Crosses: all seams real → Doubles: none
